## FHIR Queries: Prostate Cancer Patients with Bone Scan for Staging

```
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|399068003,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|C61&_include=Condition:subject

Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|41747003&reason-code=http://snomed.info/sct|258243000&_include=Procedure:subject

ImagingStudy?modality=http://dicom.nema.org/resources/ontology/DCM|NM&reason-code=http://snomed.info/sct|258243000&_include=ImagingStudy:subject

Patient?_has:Condition:patient:code=http://snomed.info/sct|399068003&_has:Procedure:patient:code=http://snomed.info/sct|41747003&_has:Procedure:patient:reason-code=http://snomed.info/sct|258243000
```

---

### Query Breakdown

| Query | Resource | Purpose | Key Codes |
|-------|----------|---------|-----------|
| **1** | `Condition` | Find prostate cancer diagnoses | SNOMED `399068003` (Malignant tumor of prostate) / ICD-10-CM `C61` |
| **2** | `Procedure` | Bone scan procedures flagged for staging | SNOMED `41747003` (Bone scan), reason `258243000` (Staging) |
| **3** | `ImagingStudy` | Nuclear medicine imaging (bone scan modality) | DICOM `NM` (Nuclear Medicine), staging reason |
| **4** | `Patient` | **Combined** — patients satisfying **both** criteria via `_has` chaining | Prostate cancer + bone scan + staging reason |

### Notes
- **Query 4** is the most targeted — returns only `Patient` resources where **both** conditions are true simultaneously.
- `ImagingStudy` (Query 3) captures bone scans stored as imaging studies rather than discrete procedures.
- Staging reason code `258243000` (SNOMED *Staging*) can be supplemented with `405978007` (*Cancer staging*) if your system uses it.
- Add `&clinical-status=active` to Query 1 to restrict to active diagnoses only.

## FHIR Queries: Prostate Cancer Patients with Bone Scan (Staging)

The request requires cross-referencing a **cancer diagnosis** (Condition), a **bone scan procedure** (Procedure/ImagingStudy), and a **cancer staging reason**, so multiple queries are needed.

---

### 1. Prostate Cancer Conditions (with Patient inclusion)
```
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|399068003,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|C61&clinical-status=active&_include=Condition:patient
```

### 2. Bone Scan Procedures with Prostate Cancer as Reason
```
Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|44555003,http://snomed.info/sct|312250003&reason-code=http://snomed.info/sct|399068003,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|C61&_include=Procedure:patient
```

### 3. Bone Scan Procedures Performed for Cancer Staging
```
Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|44555003,http://snomed.info/sct|312250003&reason-code=http://snomed.info/sct|258219007,http://snomed.info/sct|405480005&_include=Procedure:patient&_include=Procedure:reason-reference
```

### 4. Nuclear Medicine ImagingStudy (Bone Scan) linked to Prostate Cancer
```
ImagingStudy?modality=http://dicom.nema.org/resources/ontology/DCM|NM&reason-code=http://snomed.info/sct|399068003,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|C61&_include=ImagingStudy:patient
```

### 5. Combined Patient-Centric Query (Both Conditions Met)
```
Patient?_has:Condition:patient:code=http://snomed.info/sct|399068003,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|C61&_has:Procedure:patient:code=http://snomed.info/sct|44555003,http://snomed.info/sct|312250003
```

---

### Code Reference

| Concept | System | Code |
|---|---|---|
| Malignant tumor of prostate | SNOMED CT | `399068003` |
| Prostate cancer | ICD-10-CM | `C61` |
| Bone scan (procedure) | SNOMED CT | `44555003` |
| Bone scintigraphy | SNOMED CT | `312250003` |
| Cancer staging (reason) | SNOMED CT | `258219007` / `405480005` |
| Nuclear Medicine (modality) | DICOM | `NM` |

> **Tip:** Query **#5** is most efficient for finding patients satisfying **both** criteria simultaneously. Queries **#2 & #3** differentiate between *prostate cancer* and *staging* as the procedure reason — run both if your system captures these separately.
